prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约4917名，2023年因断档骤降至11862名，2024年迅速恢复至4724名，2025年物理类最低位次约6058名（取两个专业组中较后位次）。近三年 （2023年异常值除外）位次呈波动上升趋势，2025年较2024年后移约1334名，基准位次约6058名；该校在宁夏物理类招生计划2022年87人、2023年87人、2024年 83人、2025年81人，呈逐年小幅缩减态势；2026年计划81人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招，招生规模对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国矿业大学为211工程、 双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第67名（较2025年第59名下降8位），排名小幅下滑可能对考生报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；2023年声誉评价为中 性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应类事件；2026年声誉数据中无该校负面条目。抖音热度总排名第68位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未见明显热度异常。投档异 常文件中2021-2025年均无该校断档记录，录取走势相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，安全科学与工程获评A+（全国顶尖），土木工程、测绘科学与技术获评A-， 共3个A-及以上学科。安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木类等均为该校在宁夏实际招生专业，王牌学科对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动 化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）等热门专业在宁夏均有招生计划，这些专业社会关注度高，可能吸引更多高分考生报考。宁夏2026年高考报名 总人数约66000人（不确定），按2025年物理类占比67.5%估算，物理类考生约44550人，与2025年44491人基本持平，考生规模变化不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动上升趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、软科排名小幅下滑、热门工科专业持续 吸引考生等因素，在2025年基准位次6058名基础上预计竞争略有加剧。预测2026年物理类最低位次约6088名，波动区间5588-6588名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 4917, which sharply dropped to 11862 in 2023 due to a gap, then quickly recovered to 4724 in 2024. In 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was about 6058 (taking the later ranking of the two major groups). Over the past three years (excluding the 2023 anomaly), rankings have shown a fluctuating upward trend. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 1334 compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 6058. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Ningxia was 87 in 2022, 87 in 2023, 83 in 2024, and 81 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction. The 2026 plan is 81, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, and the enrollment scale has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 67th (down 8 places from 59th in 2025). This slight decline in ranking may mildly suppress candidates' enthusiasm for applying. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, mainly involving incidents related to university management responses. In 2026 reputation data, there are no negative entries for this university. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 68th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a moderate level and no obvious abnormal popularity. In the abnormal admission files from 2021 to 2025, there are no records of gaps for this university, indicating a relatively stable admission trend. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Safety Science and Engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering, and Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology were rated A-, totaling three A- and above disciplines. Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering are all actual enrollment majors in Ningxia, and the top disciplines have a stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended), and Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended) all have enrollment plans in Ningxia. These majors have high social attention and may attract more high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrations in Ningxia is about 66,000 (uncertain). Based on the 2025 Physics Category proportion of 67.5%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 44,550, roughly the same as the 44,491 in 2025, with little change in candidate scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the slight decline in Soft Science ranking, and the continued attraction of popular engineering majors, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 6058. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 6088, with a fluctuation range of 5588-6588.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Robotics Engineering
- Safety Science and Engineering (Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, etc.)
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering)
- Remote Sensing Science and Technology
- Energy and Power Engineering (Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mining Engineering (Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering, etc.)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Engineering Management, etc.)
- Surveying and Mapping Engineering (Surveying and Mapping Engineering, Geographic Information Science)
- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Engineering
- Geological Engineering (Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering)
- Materials Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6088, range 5588-6588. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information historically have rankings significantly higher than the school line), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 5500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 top majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 6500), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors and carefully consider Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 818, in 2023 approximately 792, in 2024 approximately 1128, and in 2025 the minimum ranking for history category was approximately 1362. The ranking shows a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 570 places in the past 3 years, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1362. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Ningxia was 2 in 2022, 2 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 10 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 11, an increase of 1 (+10%) compared to 2025, which helps alleviate competition pressure, and the ranking number should decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, at the upper-middle level nationally, still attractive to liberal arts candidates. Its reputation has been stable in recent years with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no records of enrollment gaps. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Safety Science and Engineering A+, Civil Engineering A-, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-), with no A-class disciplines supporting liberal arts majors, but the 211 platform still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 history category enrollment majors include Chinese Language and Literature, Network and New Media, Business Administration, English, and Public Administration. Among them, Chinese Language and Literature (recommended) and Network and New Media (clearly discouraged) show polarized popularity. The estimated number of history category candidates in Ningxia for 2026 is about 21,450, roughly the same as 21,406 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+10%), and the basically stable number of candidates, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1362. The predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 history category is approximately 1424, with a fluctuation range of 1168-1680.
